method.name: deterministic_data_view_projection
method.decision_policy: Project accepted data views and accepted document objects from the validated graph into reviewable table, pivot, text, image, summary, and formula-preview surfaces. Formula text is preserved as evidence but formula results are not treated as recalculated authority.

cells.value_preview: [데뷔 패키지] 온라인 한국어 튜터 데뷔 프로젝트

proposal_review_queue.label: 당월 산식 및 계산 규칙 표면
얼리버드 할인 또는 가격 조정 표면

parser_observations.message: Projected 44 accepted data views and 58 accepted document objects.
669 sampled formula cells are shown as formula text only; Excel recalculation is still required for formula-result authority.
Carry-forward review and quarantine queues remain attached to the projection output.
